synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-2778 Oracle Linux 9 WALinuxAgent bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2778
description:
[2.13.1.1-3.0.1.el9_7.2]
- Add oracle support to fix waagent.service build issue

[2.13.1.1-3.el9_7.2]
- wla-Jira-https-issues.redhat.com-browse-RHEL-134939.patch [RHEL-134939]
- Resolves: RHEL-134939
  (Backport ConditionVirtualization=|microsoft for waagent in RHEL 9.x [rhel-9.7.z])
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2778

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-2778.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
WALinuxAgent-2.13.1.1-3.0.1.el9_7.2.noarch.rpm
WALinuxAgent-cvm-2.13.1.1-3.0.1.el9_7.2.noarch.rpm
WALinuxAgent-udev-2.13.1.1-3.0.1.el9_7.2.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
WALinuxAgent-2.13.1.1-3.0.1.el9_7.2.noarch.rpm
WALinuxAgent-cvm-2.13.1.1-3.0.1.el9_7.2.noarch.rpm
WALinuxAgent-udev-2.13.1.1-3.0.1.el9_7.2.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/WALinuxAgent-2.13.1.1-3.0.1.el9_7.2.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[2.13.1.1-3.0.1.el9_7.2]
- Add oracle support to fix waagent.service build issue

[2.13.1.1-3.el9_7.2]
- wla-Jira-https-issues.redhat.com-browse-RHEL-134939.patch [RHEL-134939]
- Resolves: RHEL-134939
  (Backport ConditionVirtualization=|microsoft for waagent in RHEL 9.x [rhel-9.7.z])
